semantic_description: The function scans a nonempty null-terminated character array from index 0 until it finds that the next character is the terminating zero, then returns the current character. The contract relates the return value to the last element l[n - 1] of the nonzero prefix l, preserves the full character array memory, uses a while(1) loop with a break on s[i + 1] == 0, and does not modify memory.
